overall.description: A first-person exploration of a snowy Nordic village at night under the aurora borealis. The player approaches a wooden Viking longhouse, enters to explore the fire-lit interior with food and shields, then exits to wander through torch-lit snowy paths before approaching a large carved wooden dragon statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy approach to Nordic longhouse under aurora

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through snow toward the wooden longhouse entrance, ascending the steps

entered.detail: triangular wooden Viking longhouse with carved dragon head at the peak
green and blue northern lights shimmering across the night sky
deep snow covering the ground with visible footprints
rough wooden post fence lining the path
burning torches on posts illuminating the snowy path

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a traditional wooden Viking longhouse through deep snow at night. The aurora borealis illuminates the sky above the triangular building, while torch lanterns cast warm light on the snow-covered path and wooden fence lining the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of wooden longhouse with fire lighting

events.description: entering the wooden longhouse from the snowy exterior through the main doorway
interior firelight and candles become dominant as natural aurora light fades

agents.ego_description: stepping through the doorway into the longhouse and exploring the interior space

entered.detail: carved wooden entrance with intricate Nordic patterns on the frame
rough-hewn wooden log walls with shields and tapestries hanging
burning fire pit with flames providing warm orange light
long wooden table set with food items, candles, and metal dishes
stacked wooden storage crates against the wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the longhouse, the camera explores a warmly lit interior with wooden walls, a central fire pit, and a table laden with food and candles. The space is cozy and enclosed, with decorative shields hanging on the walls and wooden crates stacked nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy village path with torch lighting

events.description: exiting the longhouse back into the snowy night environment

agents.ego_description: leaving the longhouse and walking along the snowy village path lined with torches

entered.detail: snow-covered trail winding through the village with visible footprints
tall wooden posts with burning torches lighting the path
raised wooden platform with a ladder leaning against it
small evergreen tree decorated with a hanging lantern

segments.scene_description: Exiting the longhouse, the camera moves through a quiet snowy village at night. The path is illuminated by torch posts and leads past wooden structures, a raised platform with a ladder, and snow-covered trees under the aurora-lit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dragon statue under aurora borealis

events.description: approaching the large wooden dragon statue and tilting camera upward to view against the sky

agents.ego_description: approaching the carved dragon statue and observing it against the aurora-lit sky, panning upward

entered.detail: tall carved wooden statue of a dragon or wolf with open mouth, wrapped with red bindings
snow-covered evergreen trees silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an impressive carved wooden dragon statue standing tall against the night sky. The aurora borealis creates a dramatic blue-green backdrop as the camera pans upward along the statue's form, emphasizing its scale and the swirling lights above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the cold, aurora-lit exterior of a Nordic village into the warmth of a Viking longhouse and back out toward a towering monument. It begins by gliding through deep snow along a torch-lit path toward a triangular wooden building under a shimmering sky. As the camera crosses the threshold, the environment shifts from the freezing night to a cozy, enclosed interior filled with the glow of a central fire pit, candles, and decorative shields. The scene then opens back up to the quiet village air, moving past wooden structures and snow-covered trees before turning toward a massive carved wooden dragon statue. Finally, the camera pans upward along the statue's form, merging the scale of the carving with the dramatic blue-green swirls of the aurora borealis above.
